---
title: "m2b3 Output"
description: |

output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
---

### Preprints

* Information integration across saccades plays a prominent role during goal-directed viewing of everyday scenes. [PsyArxiv](https://psyarxiv.com/8yta9). Jurewicz K, Liao B, Krishna BS. August 21, 2023.

* Correction of saccadic decisions during free-viewing visual search in the monkey. [OSF Preprints](https://osf.io/vt423). Ipata AE, Bisley JW, Krishna BS. August 21, 2023.

### Output from m2b3 lab members continuing/completing their prior work.

* Common and distinct BOLD correlates of Simon and flanker conflicts which can(not) be reduced to time-on-task effects. [BioRxiv](https://www.biorxiv.org/content/10.1101/2023.05.19.541457v1). Jakub Wojciechowski,  *Katarzyna Jurewicz*,  Patrycja Dzianok,  Ingrida Antonova,  Katarzyna Paluch,  Tomasz Wolak,  Ewa Kublik.

* Pupil size predicts the onset of exploration in brain and behavior. [BioRxiv](https://www.biorxiv.org/content/10.1101/2023.05.24.541981v1).
Akram Shourkeshti, Gabriel Marrocco, *Katarzyna Jurewicz*, Tirin Moore, R. Becket Ebitz.
